title: turnera sancta
intro: Turnera sancta, also known as the prickly poppy or yellow ginseng, is a plant species in the Turneraceae family, native to the Americas and known for its medicinal properties. The plant's leaves, roots, and stems contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Turnera sancta include reducing inflammation and improving blood sugar control, as well as providing relief from anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Turnera sancta are often made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
